title: Design System: Roselar Móveis — Sistema Interno

display.purpose: Metric values and page-level financial figures; always tabular-nums.

label.purpose: Field labels, metric labels, badges. Uppercase, 0.72rem floor.

shadows.name: repouso
shadows.purpose: Resting cards and rows; barely perceptible.

shadows.name: foco
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on interactive cards, rows, buttons; pair with translateY(-1px).

shadows.name: anel-foco
shadows.purpose: Focus ring on inputs, paired with ink border.

motion.name: transicao-padrao
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes on buttons, cards, inputs.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Alert and content entrance; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Botão Primário (Confirmar)
components.description: Money-positive confirm action — Novo Orçamento, Salvar.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .35rem; padding: .55rem 1.2rem; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: .85rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: all .2s ease-out; } .ds-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.09); } .ds-btn-primary { background: #198754; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #146C43; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(17,20,24,.2); }

components.name: Botão Escuro (Navegar)
components.description: Neutral navigation action on Preto Roselar chrome.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .35rem; padding: .55rem 1.2rem; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: .85rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s ease-out; } .ds-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.09); } .ds-btn-dark { background: #111418; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background: #23272E; }

components.name: Botão Secundário
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .35rem; padding: .55rem 1.2rem; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: .85rem; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #111418; border: 1.5px solid #DEE2E6; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F4F6F9; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.09); }

components.name: Botão Destrutivo
components.description: Irreversible action in Vermelho Roselar; always paired with consequence-stating confirm.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .35rem; padding: .55rem 1.2rem; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: .85rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-danger { background: #D32F2F; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #B02424; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.09); }

components.name: Badge de Status
components.description: Pill status marker: tinted background, deep same-hue text, uppercase label.
components.html: Aprovado Rascunho Cancelado
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: .25rem .65rem; border-radius: 2rem; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: .7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-right: .3rem; } .ds-badge-approved { background: #E8F5E9; color: #0F5132; } .ds-badge-draft { background: #E9ECEF; color: #4C5359; } .ds-badge-canceled { background: #FBE4E4; color: #8A1B1B; }

components.name: Cartão de Métrica
components.description: Dashboard metric: uppercase label over a heavy tabular number.
components.css: .ds-metric { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.04); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1.25rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06); transition: box-shadow .2s ease-out; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .ds-metric:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.09); } .ds-metric-label { font-size: .72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; color: #6C757D; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: .25rem; } .ds-metric-value { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #111418; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Campo de Busca
components.description: Search/filter input with ink focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Buscar cliente ou nº do orçamento">
components.css: .ds-input { border: 1.5px solid #DEE2E6; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: .86rem; font-weight: 500; color: #111418; padding: .5rem .9rem; width: 100%; background: #fff; transition: border-color .2s ease-out, box-shadow .2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #565C66; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #111418; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(17,20,24,.1); }

components.name: Alerta
components.description: Signature alert: tinted surface, same-hue border and deep text, icon leading.
components.html:
✓ Orçamento salvo! As alterações já estão em vigor.
⚠ Margem abaixo do limite. Ajuste o desconto antes de enviar.
components.css: .ds-alert { padding: .7rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: .84rem; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; margin-bottom: .6rem; } .ds-alert-success { background: #E8F5E9; border: 1px solid #A3CFBB; color: #0F5132; } .ds-alert-danger { background: #FBE4E4; border: 1px solid #EF9A9A; color: #8A1B1B; }

narrative.overview: The internal sales-operations system of Roselar Móveis. Calm, near-monochrome chrome that stays out of the way so financial numbers carry the screen. Personality is confiável, preciso, sóbrio — banking-grade trust in the brand's own materials: black wordmark chrome, white working surfaces, and a single red voice reserved for what demands attention. The brand is black + red; the legacy navy (#0A2640) still present in templates is to be migrated away from.
keyCharacteristics: Black chrome, white surfaces, one red voice
Numbers get the strongest hierarchy on every screen
Flat at rest; shadows respond only to interaction
Restrained color strategy: accent ≤10% of any screen
pt-BR voice: direct, professional, never blaming

rules.name: A Regra do Vermelho Único
rules.body: One red. Vermelho Roselar means attention required — margin violations, overdue, destructive. Never decorative; never a second red. Its rarity is what makes it loud.

rules.name: A Regra dos Números
rules.body: Financial values are always Preto Roselar at 700–800 weight with tabular figures. Color on a number is a signal, never decoration.

rules.name: A Regra do Peso
rules.body: Hierarchy comes from weight (500 → 700 → 800), not from adding sizes. Five steps; no intermediate sizes.

rules.name: A Regra do Plano
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. If a shadow is visible while nothing is being pointed at, it is too strong.

dos: Do use Preto Roselar (#111418) for chrome and all financial values; weight 700–800, tabular figures.
Do keep Vermelho Roselar (#D32F2F) under 10% of any screen — it is the alarm and the brand voice at once.
Do replace Navy Legado (#0A2640) with Preto Roselar whenever you touch a legacy surface.
Do put muted gray text (#6C757D) on white surfaces only; on the tinted body background it fails AA.
Do state consequences in destructive confirms with specific button labels.
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation.
donts: Don't ship startup SaaS flash: no gradient decoration, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric marketing tiles.
Don't build dense ERP (Excel-like) walls of fields and grids; one task per screen, progressive disclosure.
Don't introduce a second red or use red decoratively — A Regra do Vermelho Único.
Don't use border-left/border-right stripes thicker than 1px as accents.
Don't convey status by color alone; pair every red/green signal with an icon or text.
Don't go below 0.72rem text anywhere, or add font sizes between the five hierarchy steps.
